article_title: ASP.NET Core 路由：把 URL 稳定交给正确的端点
core_theme: 解释 ASP.NET Core 路由如何把请求匹配到端点，以及如何用模板、约束和 URL 生成减少 Web API 的路由问题。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解路由匹配、attribute routing、route constraints 和 URL generation 的常见用法，并知道 404 与 400 的边界。
summary_angle: 把一次请求从入口到端点的路径压成一张图：先匹配，再约束，最后生成可维护的 URL。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 How Routing Works Internally 章节：routing 是 route matching 与 endpoint execution 两阶段过程。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 入口请求进入一条清晰轨道，先经过匹配闸门。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Route Constraints 章节：constraints 参与路由匹配，失败时会让候选路由不成立，常见结果是 404。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中段有一个筛选环，只允许 int、guid、regex 等形状通过。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Route Names and URL Generation 章节：CreatedAtAction 与 LinkGenerator 用路由定义生成 URL，减少硬编码。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 末端端点返回一条稳定链接。

main_metaphor: 一条有检查点的请求轨道
primary_subject: 一条发光的 HTTP 请求轨道和三个明确检查点
subject_action: 请求沿轨道通过匹配、约束、生成 URL 三个步骤
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；路由主题适合用少量线条表现路径、分叉和检查点。
style_safety_note: 该风格是泛视觉类型，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻。
draft_goal: 第一轮验证请求轨道、三个信息块和极简线稿风是否清楚。
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: ASP.NET Core routing maps incoming HTTP requests to the right endpoint through matching, constraints, and URL generation. The reader should quickly feel how a request moves through the routing path and where common routing bugs come from.

Summary angle: one request travels through three checkpoints: match, constrain, generate URL.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- Step: routing first matches a request to a candidate endpoint. Visible label: 匹配. Numeric chip: 1.
- Mechanism: route constraints filter values such as int, guid, and regex during matching. Visible label: 约束. Numeric chip: 2.
- Takeaway: CreatedAtAction and LinkGenerator generate URLs from route definitions. Visible label: 生成URL. Numeric chip: 3.

Main metaphor: a request rail with checkpoints.
Subject: a glowing HTTP request rail, moving through three precise checkpoints.
Composition/framing: slight diagonal progression across a wide 2.35:1 frame, one clear rail as the main subject, sparse callout chips near the checkpoints.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: ink black, cool white, teal green, amber yellow.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels or number chips by default, and no more than 4 when strictly necessary, all sourced from the information blocks. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters or one required product/model name. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real product screenshot, dashboard, terminal output, fake architecture node names, neon city background, code rain, generic robot pose.
